title: rubus × wahlbergii
intro: Rubus × wahlbergii, also known as the American dewberry, is a deciduous shrub that belongs to the Rosaceae family and is a hybrid of the American blackberry (Rubus allegheniensis) and the common dewberry (Rubus argutus). The plant's medicinal properties include its rich content of anthocyanins, ellagic acid, and other polyphenols, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus × wahlbergii include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and potentially preventing certain types of cancer, due to its high antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of Rubus × wahlbergii can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
